transcript: Time for a love potion, a little sweet and spice Throw it all in a cauldron, mix it up real nice Fire in my eyes, stir counterclockwise I dream of you all night Filled with emotion, follow the signs With this love potion, you will be all mine I'm pulling you closer to me, you're finding it harder to breathe The magic is taking over your mind, it's a irony I'm the only one that you see, I got what you want, what you need Before you know it, you won't fall in need of love with me I'm the only potion, potion with a sweet mind I'm the only one that you see I got what you want, what you need I'm the only potion, potion with a sweet mind for you I made a love potion for you This is the moment, no turning back One drop on your lips and the spell will take a turn

timestamps.text: Time for a love potion, a little sweet and spice Throw it all in a cauldron, mix it up real nice Fire in my eyes, stir counterclockwise I dream of you all night Filled with emotion, follow the signs With this love potion, you will be all mine I'm pulling you closer to me, you're finding it harder to breathe The magic is taking over your mind, it's a irony I'm the only one that you see, I got what you want, what you need Before you know it, you won't fall in need of love with me I'm the only potion, potion with a sweet mind I'm the only one that you see I got what you want, what you need I'm the only potion, potion with a sweet mind for you I made a love potion for you
This is the moment, no turning back
One drop on your lips and the spell will take a turn
